info.title: gumcli
info.description: CLI for Gum UI projects — create projects, check errors, generate C# code

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: gumcli v2026.3.28.2+866ee46543a5ce1f86a41e7504b61c0752a3152b - create projects, check for errors, and generate code.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path for the new .gumx project file. If no .gumx extension is provided, a project folder and file are created using the given name.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check a Gum project for errors.

commands.name: codegen
commands.description: Generate C# code for a Gum project.

commands.name: codegen-init
commands.description: Auto-configure code generation settings by locating the nearest .csproj above the .gumx file.

commands.name: fonts
commands.description: Generate missing bitmap font files for a Gum project.

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Render a Gum Screen or Component to a PNG file.

arguments.name: element
arguments.description: Name of the Screen or Component to render.

commands.name: svg
commands.description: Render a Gum Screen or Component to an SVG file.

arguments.name: element
arguments.description: Name of the Screen or Component to render.
